suppress.notes: file name: rewrite-jenkins-0.22.0-SNAPSHOT.jar sev: HIGH reason: False positive. These CVEs are for Jenkins plugins, not the rewrite-jenkins recipe jar.
file name: rewrite-openapi-0.6.0-SNAPSHOT.jar sev: HIGH reason: False positive. CVE-2022-24863 is about the Go http-swagger package, not the Java rewrite-openapi library.
file name: rewrite-logging-frameworks-2.19.0-SNAPSHOT.jar: log4j-1.2.17.jar sev: CRITICAL reason: This is a false positive. Used for identifying log4j vulnerabilities.

file name: openai4j-0.25.0.jar sev: MEDIUM reason: False positive. CVE-2025-43714 is about ChatGPT's web UI rendering SVG inline (stored XSS in shared conversations). It has nothing to do with the openai4j Java client library. The scanner is incorrectly associating the CVE with this client library.

file name: rewrite-openapi-*.jar sev: MEDIUM reason: False positive. CVE-2024-25712 is about the Go http-swagger package (XSS via httpSwagger.WrapHandler), not the Java rewrite-openapi library. The scanner is matching on the "swagger"/"openapi" name in the artifact.
False positive. CVE-2026-39883 is for the Go opentelemetry-go SDK (PATH hijacking of the kenv command on BSD). The Java io.opentelemetry packages are unaffected. Added: 2026-04-16
False positive. CVE-2026-39882 is for Go OTLP HTTP exporters (unbounded response body reading). The Java io.opentelemetry packages are unaffected. Added: 2026-04-16
